case_title: PETER MENECHINO et al VS. CITIGROUP INC. et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFFS PETER MENECHINO, MICHAEL MENECHINO, DOUGLAS SCHONFIELD AND MADELINE DEL NEGRO'S MOTION TO SEAL PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFFS COMPLAINT. THE TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED. GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND THE MOTION COMPLIES WITH CALIFORNIA RULE OF COURT 2.550. THE CLERK OF THE COURT SHALL SEAL THE ENTIRE COMPLAINT AND PLAINTIFFS MAY FILE A REDACTED VERSION OF THE COMPLAINT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976

Ntc Of Motion To Seal Portions Of Pltfs Complaint
Off Calendar May-03-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Glicel Sumagaysay, Esq., from Minami Tamaki LLP, 415-788-9000, for plaintiff and moving party

No other Appearance. The Tentative Ruling is adopted.
PLAINTIFFS PETER MENECHINO, MICHAEL MENECHINO, DOUGLAS SCHONFIELD AND MADELINE DEL NEGRO'S Motion To Seal Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint is Granted. No opposition filed and the motion complies with California Rule of Court 2.550. The clerk of the court shall seal the entire complaint and plaintiffs may file a redacted version of the complaint. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976
